summary: Held 100% cash again. Bankroll $10,000, flat, no positions. Tape is a modest risk-on recovery (SPY +0.5%) led by a semiconductor-reversal narrative that is already public and fading intraday, while every liquid name I care about (GOOGL/TSLA Wed, INTC Thu) is a binary earnings coin-flip this week. No articulable mispricing with 2:1 asymmetry and clean invalidation, so no trade — dodging activity bias and chasing. My real setup is the post-earnings gaps Thursday/Friday.
